description: A fleet dispatcher named James Rodriguez (identifier: 4B-22, email: james.rodriguez@opencad.local) was suspended from the OpenCAD dispatch system three weeks ago for failing to complete mandatory quarterly safety compliance training. He has now completed the training and needs his account reactivated. Log in to OpenCAD (http://localhost) as the administrator (email: admin@opencad.local, password: Admin123!) and reactivate James Rodriguez's account. Do not change the status of any other users; specifically, Sarah Mitchell should remain unapproved.
